home.title: Official Store
home.keywords: Sensing lights, Fashionable sensing lights, Stylish ambiance lights, Trendy luminary pieces, Fashion-forward illuminators, Connected lamps, High-tech mood lighting accessories, Sensing lights for design enthusiasts, Cutting-edge luminaires, Fashion meets technology in lighting
home.description: Welcome to Flytrade, your destination for stylish and innovative lighting fixtures. Our collection includes a variety of smart lighting options such as motion-sensing lights and ambient atmosphere lights. Our fixtures not only offer a chic design but also provide unique features and capabilities that enhance the ambiance and convenience of your space. Explore our range of lighting fixtures and discover a world of illumination that stands out from the rest.

protocol_sales.title: Sales Policy
order_checkout.pay_info.pay_after_arriva: The buyer pays the price in cash at the receiving site when signing for the package.
product.service_agreement.delivery_terms:
1、Enjoy complimentary worldwide shipping on all orders.

2、Delivery times may vary based on your location, with shipping typically taking 7-15 days to most addresses in Europe and the United States.

3、Tracking information/numbers will be automatically sent to your email upon order shipment.

4、If you encounter any issues during the shipping process, please contact us at $email
product.service_agreement.product_guaran:
1、We guarantee that all products we sell are of high quality, compliant with relevant standards and regulations. If you discover any quality issues with the product, please contact us within 7 days of receiving the item, and we will provide a refund or exchange service.

2、We promise timely delivery and offer free worldwide shipping. If any damage or loss occurs due to shipping issues, we will take responsibility and either resend the item or provide a refund.

3、We provide customer service support. If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us at $email. We will make every effort to resolve your issues and ensure your shopping experience is satisfactory.

4、If you are unsatisfied with your purchase or require a return or exchange, please contact us within 7 days of receiving the product. The item must be in its original packaging and in good condition, and we will assist you with the refund or exchange process.
product.service_agreement.view_order_det:
1、After placing your order, you will be directed to the order details page where you can find a copy button in the top left corner to copy the order link.

2、Within the next day of placing your order, you will receive an email from us containing the order link for you to conveniently track your order status.

3、If you are logged into your website account, you can easily locate your order in the "My Account" section.

*Through the order link, you can access detailed order information, including updates on shipping and logistics.

common.cookie.cookie_alert.title: We Value Your Privacy
common.cookie.cookie_alert.content: We use cookies to personalize and enhance your browsing experience on our websites. You can manage your settings at any time through $1 or read our $2 to learn more.
common.cookie.cookie_setting.title: Cookie Settings
common.cookie.cookie_setting.desc: Cookies are small files which, when placed on your device, enable us to provide certain features and functionality of websites and online services to you. We use the following types of cookies on our websites. View $1 for full details.
common.cookie.cookie_setting.essential_c: These cookies are necessary for you to use our website and cannot be switched off in our systems. Essential cookies are required to enable the basic functions of this site and guarantee the security and efficiency of the service required. These cookies are usually set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as logging in, requesting website visual elements and pages resources, filling in forms or adding goods to the shopping cart. Without these cookies, services you have asked for cannot be properly provided.
common.cookie.cookie_setting.functionali: These cookies are used to provide you with enhanced functionality and improve your browsing experience. These cookies may remember certain choices you have made, such as your language preference, your region, your username and password. These cookies may be set by us or by third -party providers who provide services on our pages. If you do not allow these cookies, some of these services may not function properly, and we may not be able to provide you with better personalization on user experience.
common.cookie.cookie_setting.analytical_: These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. These cookies may collect information about how you use our websites, such as which page you visit and which link you click on. These cookies help us to know which goods or pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the website. These cookies also help us understand how our services are doing and improve them by developing new features. If you do not allow these cookies, we may not be able to monitor its performance and improve your experience accordingly.
common.cookie.cookie_setting.marketing_c: These cookies can track your online activities and are used to make advertisements more relevant to you. These cookies may be set through our website by our advertising partners, which can be used to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant advertisements. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
common.pay.pay_info.email_tip: This email address will only be used to receive the order confirmation and order updates.
